mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY join_time ASC
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.avatar_url FROM chat_group_member m LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = m.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.join_time ASC
SELECT * FROM chat_group_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY join_time DESC
SELECT g.* FROM chat_group_member m INNER JOIN chat_group g ON g.id = m.group_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND g.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.join_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_deleted = 0
